overview.summary: Trees are hierarchical data structures modeling relationships rather than flat lists.
overview.interviewRelevance: The most common recursive interview questions heavily feature trees.

paragraphs: File system directories are trees. HTML DOM is a tree. Every chess engine evaluates positions in a game tree.
The reason folder navigation is fast is that your OS stores directory metadata in a B-tree, allowing binary search through millions of files.
realWorldHook.ahaMoment: A tree is just a linked list that branches out. Instead of pointing to one 'next' node, it points to multiple 'children'.

definition.technicalDefinition: A tree is an undirected, connected, acyclic graph consisting of a root node and children nodes, forming a hierarchy.

vocabulary.definition: The top-most node in the tree.
The length of the longest path from the root to a leaf.

keyProperties: Every node has exactly one parent (except the root).
Recursive structure: every child node is the root of a subtree.

operations.name: Depth-First Search (DFS)
operations.description: Traverse deeply into branches before backtracking. Can be Pre-order, In-order, or Post-order.

code.python:
def dfs(node):
    if not node: return
    dfs(node.left)
    dfs(node.right)

operations.visualNote: The search plunges to the deepest leaf before coming back up.

operations.name: Breadth-First Search (BFS)
operations.description: Traverse level by level using a queue.
operations.visualNote: The search sweeps horizontally across each level.

practice.title: Maximum Depth of Binary Tree
practice.keyInsight: Recursively take the max of left and right heights plus 1.

practice.title: Invert Binary Tree
practice.keyInsight: Swap the left and right pointers at every node.

practice.title: Subtree of Another Tree
practice.keyInsight: Recursively check if current tree equals the subRoot.

practice.title: Lowest Common Ancestor of a Binary Tree
practice.keyInsight: Bubble up boolean values indicating if targets were found.

practice.title: Binary Tree Level Order Traversal
practice.keyInsight: A standard BFS queue ensures level-by-level tracking.
